The Power Platform API is used by the Power Platform admin center (`admin.powerplatform.microsoft.com`) for tenant administration across environment management, analytics, licensing, governance, tenant settings, notifications, and application inventory.

  - Business App Platform resource provider (`api.bap.microsoft.com`)
  - Admin analytics (`{region}.adminanalytics.powerplatform.microsoft.com`)
  - Config analytics (`{region}.csanalytics.powerplatform.microsoft.com`)
  - Licensing (`licensing.powerplatform.microsoft.com`)
  - Admin portal helpers (`api.admin.powerplatform.microsoft.com`)
  - Tenant-scoped APIs (`{tenantHost}.tenant.api.powerplatform.com`)
  - Tenant island notification APIs (`{tenantIslandHost}.tenant.api.powerplatform.com`)
  - Dynamics CRM Web API (`{organizationHost}.crm.dynamics.com`)
  - Power Pages portal infrastructure (`{portalInfraHost}.portal-infra.dynamics.com`)

Requests were live-captured from exhaustive same-origin browsing of left-nav routes, list/detail drill-ins, read-only pivots, and safe report interactions across home, manage, security, Copilot, monitor, deployment, licensing, capacity, support, and environment hub surfaces.

Most backend families use browser-obtained bearer tokens with service-specific audiences plus correlation and session headers such as `X-Correlation-ID`, `x-ms-client-request-id`, `x-ms-client-session-id`, `x-ms-client-tenant-id`, and `x-ms-client-principal-id`.
Some families add service-specific headers such as `x-ms-organization-id` for Dataverse analytics or `x-ms-mac-*` headers for tenant-scoped Power Platform APIs.

Some same-origin routes remained tenant-dependent in this capture set: `copilot/getstarted` and `copilot/copilotstudio` were feature-limited, `manage/usage`, `security/portals`, and `copilot/dynamics365-sales` stayed no-data, several Dataverse user and security-role detail blades were permission-limited, and one Copilot Studio resource row exposed a missing same-origin link.

The operations below exclude `graph.microsoft.com` traffic and static locale assets. The admin health ping is unauthenticated; most other operations require a portal-derived bearer token.

Documentation and specifications have been provided on a best-effort basis and may not be 100% accurate.
